feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is there a way to submit a controlling object into BAPI_ASSET_ACQUISITION_POST?
entry.content:
How do I submit a profit center against the offsetting account when using the function module BAPI_ASSET_ACQUISITION_POST (no fields in the submitted structures/tables).

The offsetting account I am posting to requires a controlling object and the error KI235 is returned (Account nnnnn requires an assignment to a CO object).

Is this possible?

entry.title: question, is there any medical management module integrated to SAP Employee central or SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hello experts, we would like to know if there is a module where you can manage medical appointments, medication control, etc. at medical office level for an industry.
Not an independent medical center or hospital, but a small internal clinic within an industry.

Is there any solution that integrates to EMPLOYEE CENTRAL or any application already made in sap BTP or SAP independent module.

I would appreciate your comments

entry.title: RAP unmanaged entity in a managed behavior definition
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to include an existing BDEF into another.

I'm trying to create a generic Address object that I can use in multiple BOs:

The /RHP/R_Address has its behavior definition, I'd like to link it from /RHP/R_Location.

I could create an unmanaged association so I could create from the Location entity

unmanaged association _Address { create ( features : global ); with draft; }

In the corresponding methods, I read and create from the Location entity.

The problem with this approach is that the Service Binding doesn't support unmanaged draft

And if I remove the draft option I've got another error in the Maintenance Object

I also tried specifying it as a foreign entity, but it only works to include the entity in the results (failed, mapping)

foreign entity /RHP/R_Address alias Address;

Another option I'd like to test is to create an unmanaged entity (/RHP/R_LocationAddress) inside /RHP/R_Location so I can redefine create, update, and delete methods to call internally /RHP/R_Address by EML.

Can someone help me to manage the /RHP/R_Address from /RHP/R_Location?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - UDF Mapping Context Issue
entry.content:
Hi Dinu,

Thank you for the reply,

When i tested with your code I am getting a different result, please see the screen shot

First context should repeat it self based on second input count number

if count value in second context is 1 then repeat 1 time

if count value in second context is 5 then repeat 5 times

if count value in second context is 3 then repeat 3 times

Thanks

entry.title: How to read TR versions?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Pl. help us in understanding the below pic, I mean what SAP here trying to tell us? Thank you

entry.title: ABAP RAP - Behavior Projection and Implementation Class
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am building a sample app to learn RAP. I created a BO with two fields. This BO has @AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK annotation. This BO does not need any additional functionality hence after creating Behavior Definition, I thought I will skip creating behavior implemntation class and created service,

While testing the service, when I create a record, I get following error in the browser.

Runtime Error: 'RAISE_SHORTDUMP'. The OData request processing has been abnormally terminated. If you use SAP S/4HANA Cloud, please create an incident. Otherwise, if "Runtime Error" is not initial, launch ADT feed "Runtime Errors" or transaction ST22 / SM21 (system log analysis) for details and analysis.

In ADT, I can see following error(s)

Gateway error log - Backend Error: Metadata cache on hub system for current model is outdated

I also got another error, which I thought was not related to above.

The current program has intentionally triggered a termination with a short dump.

The dump analysis revealed "The exception is related to the previous exception "CX_RAP_HANDLER_NOT_IMPLEMENTED" that occurred in
program "CL_RAP_BHV_PROCESSOR==========CP", in line 30 of include "CL_RAP_BHV_PROCESSOR==========CM01G". The reason for this exception
was: Handler not implemented; Method: GLOBAL_AUTHORIZATION, Involved Entities: ZC_LV_CAT_9000"

While trying to figure out how to resolve cache issue, I decided to create the implementation class which would fix the error, The current program has intentionally triggered a termination with a short dump. however after creating the class, I did not write a single line of code and all the errors disappeared.

I am struggling to understand the relationship between the implemntation class and the other two errors. I'll appreciate any guidance in this context.

Regards

ASM

entry.title: Mã giới thiệu Binance: 106896769
entry.content:
Mã giới thiệu Binance là gì? Mã giới thiệu Binance cho giai đoạn hiện tại vào năm 2024 được xác định là “106896769”. Mã này cung cấp chiết khấu hoa hồng cao nhất là 20%. Ngoài ra, nếu bạn trả hoa hồng bằng cách mua tiền BNB, tỷ lệ chiết khấu đạt 45%. Hãy truy cập trung tâm phần thưởng bằng cách đăng ký với mã giới thiệu ngay bây giờ để nhận phần thưởng đăng ký $600!

>> TRANG WEB CHNH THUC

What is a binance futures referral code? - Binance Futures Referral Code is the code (D7YQPAYQ) that a new user can use when starting trading Futures in Binance Futures Platform.

entry.title: Codice referral MEXC | Bonus di iscrizione MEXC 5000 USDT nel 2024
entry.content:
Codice referral MEXC | Bonus di iscrizione MEXC 5000 USDT nel 2024

Il Codice referral MEXC "1huHd" è un identificatore univoco fornito dalla borsa MEXC nel 2024. Questo codice consente agli utenti attuali di invitare altri a partecipare al trading sulla piattaforma MEXC. I nuovi utenti che si registrano utilizzando il codice referral "1huHd" ricevono uno sconto del 50% su tutte le commissioni di negoziazione e possono richiedere un bonus di iscrizione fino a 5.000 USDT.
I codici di riferimento in genere offrono agli utenti un modo personalizzato per invitare altri, siano essi amici, familiari o chiunque desideri aderire alla piattaforma MEXC. Occasionalmente, codici di riferimento più ampi potrebbero essere disponibili durante promozioni o campagne di marketing specifiche, ma per un periodo limitato. Rimanere informati su queste opportunità è fondamentale. Puoi farlo tenendo d'occhio il sito web ufficiale, gli annunci o i canali dei social media di MEXC per ricevere aggiornamenti personalizzati in base alle tue preferenze di trading.

Codice referral MEXC

entry.title: Kode Referensi Bybit: 62545 (Klaim $30.000 Bonus Pendaftaran Bybit Gratis)
entry.content:
Kode Referensi Bybit: 62545 (Klaim $30.000 Bonus Pendaftaran Bybit Gratis)
Jika Anda mencari pertukaran kripto untuk memperdagangkan kripto dengan cepat, aman, dan mudah digunakan, lihat Bybit Exchange, salah satu platform perdagangan derivatif kripto teratas di dunia. Dan jika Anda menggunakan kode promo Bybit khusus kami: 62545, Anda bisa mendapatkan bonus dan komisi hingga $30.000!

Apa itu Kode Referensi Bybit?
Kode rujukan Bybit adalah kode undangan yang dapat Anda gunakan untuk bergabung dengan platform Bybit untuk berdagang mata uang kripto online dan mendapatkan bonus pendaftaran kripto gratis. Kode tersebut dapat memberi Anda berbagai keuntungan, seperti bonus, reward, dan diskon.

Anda dapat bergabung dengan Bybit dengan menggunakan kode referensi “62545” saat mendaftar. Kode ini akan memberi Anda bonus selamat datang hingga $30.000 USDT dan diskon 10% pada biaya perdagangan Anda untuk bulan pertama.

Anda juga bisa mendapatkan lebih banyak hadiah dengan membagikan kode Anda kepada orang lain dan mendapatkan komisi, kupon, dan kotak misteri. Kode promo Bybit adalah cara terbaik untuk memulai petualangan kripto Anda dengan beberapa fasilitas tambahan dan berdagang dengan mudah.

Persyaratan Untuk Kualifikasi Bonus
Agar memenuhi syarat untuk bonus pendaftaran Bybit 30.000 USDT, beberapa syarat dan ketentuan harus dipenuhi:

Untuk berpartisipasi secara resmi, pengguna harus mendaftar menggunakan tautan rujukan, melakukan deposit, dan mengklaim hadiahnya melalui Hub Hadiah Bybit.
Anda berhak atas penawaran ini jika Anda membuat akun Bybit menggunakan tautan rujukan dan melakukan setoran awal.
Jika Anda menyetor 250.000 USDT dan menyelesaikan perdagangan senilai 150 juta USDT, Anda bisa mendapatkan seluruh bonus sebesar 30.000 USDT sebagai pengguna referensi yang memenuhi syarat.
Bonus deposit akan secara otomatis diberikan kepada pengguna yang memenuhi syarat di Rewards Hub setelah periode penilaian risiko 3 hari berakhir.
Pengguna perlu mengklaim bonus Bybit mereka secara manual dari Rewards Hub.
Jika Anda menarik deposit Anda dalam waktu tiga hari setelah periode penghitungan deposit 14 hari, Anda akan didiskualifikasi dari penawaran.
Hanya perdagangan derivatif yang akan dipertimbangkan untuk volume perdagangan. Deposit dalam perdagangan fiat dan spot tidak akan dimasukkan dalam perhitungan volume perdagangan Anda.
Cara Klaim Bonus menggunakan Kode Referensi Bybit: 62545
Untuk mendapatkan bonus dengan Kode Referensi Bybit: 62545, ikuti langkah-langkah berikut:

Langkah 1: Daftar di Bybit menggunakan tautan Referensi
Kunjungi situs web atau aplikasi seluler Bybit dan klik “Daftar”. Atau daftar menggunakan [Tautan Referensi Bybit] ini. Masukkan email, kata sandi, dan kode referensi Anda (62545). Anda juga dapat menggunakan nomor ponsel Anda sebagai pengganti email. Setujui persyaratan dan kebijakan privasi dan klik "Daftar". Masukkan kode dari Bybit untuk memverifikasi email atau nomor ponsel Anda.

Langkah 2: Lakukan Deposit Kripto Pertama Anda
Sekarang, klik “Aset” di atas. Pilih kripto yang ingin Anda setorkan dan klik “Setor”. Anda akan melihat kode QR dan alamat untuk mengirim dana dari dompet Anda.

Langkah 3: Klaim Bonus di Halaman “Rewards Hub”.
Setelah menyetor dana, klik “Rewards Hub” di atas. Anda akan melihat berbagai tugas untuk mendapatkan hadiah, seperti melakukan deposit pertama, menggunakan take profit/stop loss, memperdagangkan kontrak USDT, dll. Hadiahnya adalah bonus dan kupon yang dapat Anda gunakan untuk mengurangi biaya dan kerugian. Klik “Klaim” untuk setiap tugas yang telah Anda lakukan dan nikmati hadiahnya.

entry.title: Bybit 紹介コード: 62545 ($30,000 の Bybit サインアップ ボーナスを無料で請求)
entry.content:
Bybit 推荐码：62545（免费领取 30,000 美元 Bybit 注册奖金）
如果您正在寻找一个加密货币交易所来快速、安全且易于使用地进行加密货币交易，请查看Bybit Exchange，它是世界上顶级的加密货币衍生品交易平台之一。 如果您使用我们的特殊 Bybit 促销代码：62545，您可以获得高达 30,000 美元的奖金和佣金！

Bybit推荐码是什么？
Bybit推荐码是一个邀请码，您可以使用它加入Bybit平台在线交易加密货币并获得免费的加密货币开卡奖金。 该代码可以为您带来各种好处，例如奖金、奖励和折扣。

您注册时使用推荐码“62545”即可加入Bybit。 此代码将为您提供高达 30,000 美元 USDT 的欢迎奖金以及第一个月交易费用 10% 的折扣。

您还可以通过与他人分享您的代码并获得佣金、优惠券和神秘盒子来赚取更多奖励。 Bybit 促销代码是开始您的加密货币冒险的好方法，并提供一些额外的福利和轻松交易。

奖金资格要求
为了获得 30,000 USDT Bybit 开卡奖励，必须满足以下几项条款和条件：

要正式参与，用户必须使用推荐链接注册、存款并通过 Bybit 的奖励中心领取奖励。
如果您使用推荐链接创建 Bybit 账户并进行初始存款，您就有资格享受此优惠。
如果您存入 250,000 USDT 并完成价值 1.5 亿 USDT 的交易，您作为合格推荐用户即可获得 30,000 USDT 的全额奖金。
一旦 3 天的风险评估期结束，存款奖金将自动发放给奖励中心中符合条件的用户。
用户需要从奖励中心手动领取 Bybit 奖金。
如果您在 14 天存款计算期后三天内提取任何存款，您将被取消优惠资格。
交易量仅考虑衍生品交易。 法币和现货交易的存款不会包含在您的交易量计算中。
如何使用Bybit推荐码：62545领取奖金
要通过Bybit推荐码：62545获得奖金，请按照以下步骤操作：

第 1 步：使用推荐链接在 Bybit 上注册
访问Bybit网站或移动应用程序并点击“注册”。 或使用此[Bybit 推荐链接] 进行注册。 输入您的电子邮件、密码和推荐码 (62545)。 您还可以使用手机号码代替电子邮件。 同意条款和隐私政策并单击“注册”。 输入 Bybit 的代码以验证您的电子邮件或手机号码。

第 2 步：进行您的第一笔加密货币存款
现在，单击顶部的“资产”。 选择您想要存入的加密货币，然后点击“存入”。 您将看到一个二维码和一个用于从您的钱包发送资金的地址。

第三步：在“奖励中心”页面领取奖金
存入资金后，点击顶部的“奖励中心”。 您会看到不同的任务来获得奖励，例如进行首次存款、使用止盈/止损、交易 USDT 合约等。奖励是奖金和优惠券，您可以使用它们来减少费用和损失。 点击您完成的每项任务的“领取”并享受您的奖励。
